summary: Small rectangular single-story modern structure with a raised rim roof and layered exterior bands: lower wooden planks and stone, a middle glass window strip, a white smooth band, and an upper wood band capped by stone slabs. Surrounded by a low white border/ledge set on a dirt foundation.

shape.overall_form: simple rectangular box with flat raised central roof area and a shallow parapet
shape.symmetry: bilaterally symmetric along long axis (mirrored windows and bands), appears symmetric on all four sides except possible entrance not visible

elements: continuous horizontal window strip (several 1x1 windows in a row)
raised flat roof with stone slab parapet
outer low white border/ledge around building footprint
layered wall bands: bottom wood, stone/stonebrick middle, white band, top wood band
rebuild_hints: Build a rectangular footprint ~9x15 blocks. Place a one-block-high wooden base trim around bottom of exterior walls.
Add a one- to two-block-high stone/stonebrick course above the wooden base; insert a row of glass windows (1 block high) centered in the wall.
Above windows place a single smooth white block band (likely quartz) one block high, then a one-block-high wood plank band, capped by stone slabs as a parapet.
Create an inner raised flat roof inset by one block from the parapet; fill inner roof with wood planks to match photos.
Surround footprint with a 1-block-high white ledge border offset one block from walls (quartz slabs/blocks).
uncertainties: Exact block types: 'quartz' and 'stone_slab' inferred from color/shape but could be smooth stone, and wood species uncertain.
Precise footprint dimensions: estimated from visible window count and proportions; exact width/depth may differ by ±2 blocks.
Entrance location and any doors are not visible in provided views; there may be an entry on an unseen side.
Interior layout and height: only exterior shell visible so interior floor plan, ceiling height, and any partitions are unknown.
